events.purpose: Grant purchased access, XP, crowns, or supporter perks.
events.creditBehavior: If a customer credit balance paid the invoice, fulfill the purchase normally.

events.purpose: Confirm subscription invoice was paid and update local access status.
events.creditBehavior: Mark invoice as covered even when paid by customer balance credit.

events.purpose: Pause or warn when payment fails.
events.creditBehavior: Check whether coupon/credit fallback is allowed before pausing.
Do not restore access unless a new paid or credited subscription exists.

events.purpose: Adjust tier, upgrade, downgrade, or cancellation-at-period-end state.
events.creditBehavior: Respect Stripe proration and billing cycle state.

security: Verify Stripe webhook signatures in backend code.
Do not process webhook events from unverified sources.
Do not store card data locally.
Use Stripe customer ID as billing identifier only in secure backend storage.
